critic_justifications.NY Times: Brantley praised the show's comedic inventiveness and Cole Escola's sharp writing, though noted some uneven execution.
critic_justifications.Variety: Critic highlighted the show's clever premise and strong performances across multiple casting iterations.
critic_justifications.Hollywood Reporter: Review acknowledged the show's humor and cultural commentary while noting it doesn't always sustain its concept.
critic_justifications.NY Post: Positive reception emphasizing the show's entertainment value and the strength of its rotating cast members.
critic_justifications.The Guardian: Mixed-to-positive review appreciating the comedic ambition while finding some moments fall flat.
critic_justifications.Vulture: Strong review praising the show's irreverent humor and the chemistry of its various star performers.

audience_justifications.Show-Score: Audience consensus has been solidly positive with strong A-range ratings reflecting enjoyment of the comedy.
audience_justifications.Broadway Scorecard: Community ratings show consistent approval with audiences responding well to the show's humor and star turns.
audience_justifications.Broadway.com: Audience reviews trend positive, with viewers appreciating the show's irreverent take on historical figures.
